name: Old World Sauerkraut Supper
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon and Polish sausage until crisp; drain.
2. Add flour to the drippings and blend well.
3. Stir in sauerkraut; mix well.
4. Place the sauerkraut mixture, bacon, and sausage pieces into a CROCK-POT.
5. Add all other ingredients; stir together thoroughly.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours (High: 3 to 4 hours).
